summary: Tested PRC Statement page - bank passbook style ledger. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend page renders correctly with summary cards, filter buttons, table with all columns, and pagination. Mining entries correctly show as 'Reward' type with 'Daily Reward Collected' narration. Burn entries display correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: prc_statement.py TYPE_MAP correctly maps mining/credit types to 'Reward'
prc_statement.py build_narration() correctly returns 'Daily Reward Collected' for Reward type
prc_statement.py correctly deduplicates entries using seen_txn_ids set
prc_statement.py correctly calculates totals before filtering
PRCStatement.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
PRCStatement.js correctly displays summary cards with total_earned, total_used, current_balance
PRCStatement.js filter buttons work correctly with filter_type parameter
PRCStatement.js pagination works with page and limit parameters

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Page renders correctly, filters work, pagination works)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC Statement feature fully verified. Backend API returns correct structure with entries containing date, type, narration, credit, debit, balance. Filters work (Reward, Burn, etc.). Sort order works (asc/desc). Pagination works. Mining entries correctly mapped to 'Reward' type with 'Daily Reward Collected' narration. Frontend renders clean table with all columns and filter buttons.

GET /api/prc-statement/{uid}.entries: array with date, type, narration, credit, debit, balance

PRCStatement.summary_section: data-testid='summary-section' - Shows 3 cards with Total Earned (CR), Total Used (DR), Current Balance
PRCStatement.filter_section: data-testid='filter-section' - Filter buttons for All, Reward, Recharge, etc.
PRCStatement.desktop_table: data-testid='desktop-table' - Table with Date, Type, Narration, CR, DR, Balance columns
PRCStatement.pagination: data-testid='pagination' - Prev/Next buttons with page info
